metadata.summary: CarConnectivity plugin for publishing data to ABRP (https://abetterrouteplanner.com)

modules.name: carconnectivity_plugins.abrp._version
documentation: don't change, don't track in version control

modules.name: carconnectivity_plugins.abrp.plugin
documentation: Module implements the plugin to connect with ABRP

classes.name: carconnectivity_plugins.abrp.plugin.Plugin

methods.name: carconnectivity_plugins.abrp.plugin.Plugin._update_telemetry
documentation:
Publishes the data of the given vehicle to ABRP.
Args:
    vehicle (GenericVehicle): The vehicle to publish data for.

methods.name: carconnectivity_plugins.abrp.plugin.Plugin.shutdown
documentation:
Shuts down the connector by persisting current state, closing the session,
and cleaning up resources.

This method performs the following actions:
1. Persists the current state.
2. Closes the session.
3. Sets the session and manager to None.
4. Calls the shutdown method of the base connector.

Plugin class for ABRP connectivity.
Args:
    car_connectivity (CarConnectivity): An instance of CarConnectivity.
    config (Dict): Configuration dictionary containing connection details.
